positive: A sophisticated, symmetrical composition featuring stylized abstract flora interwoven with geometric celestial bodies. Elements should include intricate vine structures, glowing geometric petals, and nebula dust rendered as sharp, contrasting shapes. The overall mood is ethereal, mystic, and peaceful. Use a color palette of deep midnight blue, vibrant cyan, glowing emerald green, and touches of crisp gold. The style must be highly detailed digital illustration combined with modern linework, prioritizing strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast perfect for apparel printing. Central focus, maximalist but organized, suitable for repeating or single placement on clothing.
negative: blurry, messy, realistic photo, photorealism, ugly, cropped, watermark, text, signature, low detail, grayscale, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, artifact, blur, gradient fade
